description: At an academic facility pool, students including Callie and Seth have a late-night swim. Suddenly, the pool water rapidly freezes, trapping Seth's leg. The others frantically free him, covering him with a S.H.I.E.L.D. towel, as the group grapples with the shocking event.

transcript.line: I completely blew the question on Von Neumann's entropy. Freaking thermodynamics.
Test's over, Callie. Just let it go.
Yeah, that's easy for you to say. You probably aced it.
What you need is a little distraction.
This will distract me just fine.
Well, suit yourself. Whoo! Come on, Callie! Live a little!
Come on, have some fun, Callie.
They can't bust us for coming in here!
No! Get it off me! Aah!
I'm trying! Aah! Aah! My leg! Get it off me! Aah!
